title: What are Beam Rifles?
overview: Hikari just started at Chidori High School, and she's gonna join the Rifle Shooting Club — but only if she can find four students to join the club before the day is over!

title: Club is Funny
overview: Hikari knows what she’s aiming for: the Olympics! Before she can hope to compete there, however, she’ll need to try competing against other shooting clubs to gain experience.

title: Our Competitors are Powerful
overview: The Chidori RSC's first practice match is here, and their opponents attend none other than Asaka Academy High School — home of last year's Nationals' runner-up!

title: Our Advisor is a Beginner
overview: After an enjoyable Sunday, the team returns to school and learns they need a new club advisor to be eligible for the qualifiers!

title: Qualifiers are Exciting
overview: Prefectural qualifiers are tomorrow, and nerves are running high for everyone in the competition. Can Hikari keep her cool on the range, or will consistency be her downfall?

title: Our Target is Nationals
overview: Hikari is in second place, so she's guaranteed to advance to Nationals, right? Unfortunately, there are still plenty of competitors who could beat her score!

title: Studying is Hard
overview: They might be headed to Nationals, but that doesn't mean the members of the Chidori RSC can slack off on their finals! Too bad they only have two days before the big test...

title: Our Battlefield is Tsutsuga
overview: The road to Nationals is almost at its end. The destinies of Hikari and her friends lie ahead at the Tsutsuga Rifle Range in Hiroshima prefecture!

title: Hozumi is the Reigning Champ
overview: When Yuko decided the team competition order, she had no idea that the final slot was so important! Now the pressure is on Yukio to get the team off to a great start.

title: Hime in Crisis
overview: Marksmanship relies heavily on the competitor's mental state. Lose focus even a little, and your accuracy will be all over the place... a dilemma Erika knows about all too well.

title: Shooting is Our Dream
overview: The competition is fierce, and if Hikari hopes to compete with her more experienced opponents, she'll have to pull out all the stops in the next round of Nationals!

title: The Finals Are Beginning
overview: Weeks of training have all come down to this: the individual competition. When the dust settles, who will wear the crown of victory?
